geography.data_source: Census 2011 ward boundary shapefiles, North Delhi district. Covers Civil Lines, Kamla Nagar, Model Town, Mukherjee Nagar, Delhi University campus belt.

demographics.data_source: Census 2011 North Delhi district tables. Density = 890000 / 60.2 ≈ 14784. High literacy (0.89) driven by university belt and Civil Lines educated population.

income_profile.data_source: NSSO 78th Round MPCE distribution (North Delhi district). Relatively even distribution — mix of Civil Lines affluent residents, university staff, and Mukherjee Nagar PG-dwelling aspirants who pull the median down.

commute_profile.data_source: DMRC Origin-Destination Survey 2022, Census 2011 Table D-13. Yellow Line serves the university corridor. High student ridership keeps metro dependency elevated despite moderate car ownership.

sensitivity_parameters.data_source: Composite scores. Highest exam sensitivity in Delhi (0.92) due to Mukherjee Nagar UPSC coaching cluster and DU student body. Low exam trust (0.52) reflects post-NEET 2024 sentiment among aspirants. Very low collective action threshold (0.32) due to student union tradition and protest culture. High diffusion (0.82) reflects educated, digitally connected population.

social_network_parameters.data_source: Estimated from IHDS-II and DU student population data. Mixed network type: residential colonies (Civil Lines, Model Town) + student hostel/PG clusters (Mukherjee Nagar, Kamla Nagar). Moderate cross-income bridging as students from diverse backgrounds mix.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Kamla Nagar Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Primary shopping and food market for DU North Campus students. Footfall spikes during academic sessions.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Mukherjee Nagar Coaching Hub
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from coaching centre density surveys. India's largest UPSC coaching cluster — 200+ coaching institutes, supporting ecosystem of PG accommodation, photocopying, food stalls.

informal_economy_nodes.name: Model Town Market
informal_economy_nodes.data_source: Estimated from MCD market data. Local residential market serving Model Town and GTB Nagar.

tier1_agent_archetype_weights.data_source: AGENT_SPEC.md Examination Hub template (lines 777-786). Sum = 1.00. Exam aspirants (0.22) dominate due to Mukherjee Nagar UPSC cluster. Students (0.18) reflect DU campus. Small business owners (0.12) include coaching centre operators.

tier2_agent_types.data_source: Estimated from DU faculty directory, coaching centre registrations, DUSU election data, and MCD ward councillor count.
